Biceps Brachii m. (Bicipital Aponeurosis Cut)
Origin: Supraglenoid tubercle of scapula (long head); coracoid process of scapula (short head)
Insertion: Radial tuberosity, and antebrachial fascia via the bicipital aponeurosis
